name: Penumbra Inc
summary: PART I . Overview References herein to we, us, our, the Company, and Penumbra, refer to Penumbra, Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries unless expressly indicated or the context requires otherwise. Penumbra, the worlds leading thrombectomy company, is focused on developing the most innovative technologies for challenging medical conditions such as ischemic stroke, venous thromboembolism such as pulmonary embolism, and acute limb ischemia.
